equation_failures: GRAND_TOTAL (6.77) != SUBTOTAL (6.00) + TAX (0.00) = 6.00. Difference: 0.77 | SUBTOTAL (6.00) != sum(LINE_TOTAL) (6.77) - DISCOUNT (0.00) = 6.77. Difference: -0.77
root_cause: OCR split: 'Subtotal: $6 77' parsed as $6.00 instead of $6.77. Amazon Fresh format splits dollar amounts across OCR lines.
action: fix OCR split handling for multi-word dollar amounts

root_cause: OCR split: 'Purchase total $17 .62' → GRAND_TOTAL labeled on '$17' (=17.00) and '.62' (=0.62) separately. Two GRAND_TOTAL values instead of one $17.62.
action: fix OCR split handling for multi-word dollar amounts

equation_failures: GRAND_TOTAL (11.14) != SUBTOTAL (11.14) + TAX (0.00) - DISCOUNT (9.20) = 1.94. Difference: 9.20 | SUBTOTAL (11.14) != sum(LINE_TOTAL) (11.08) - DISCOUNT (9.20) = 1.88. Difference: 9.26
root_cause: DISCOUNT double-count: 'Promo/Markdown Savings: -$9.20' labeled as DISCOUNT but Amazon Fresh SUBTOTAL ($11.14) already incorporates the discount. Equation subtracts discount again.
action: don't label Amazon Fresh 'Promo/Markdown Savings' as DISCOUNT since SUBTOTAL already reflects it

root_cause: Duplicate SUBTOTAL: 'Pre-savings total: $13.98' and 'Subtotal $13.98' both labeled SUBTOTAL. Two SUBTOTAL values (sum=27.96) breaks equation.
action: only label actual 'Subtotal' line, not 'Pre-savings total'

root_cause: RETURN receipt: prices have trailing minus ('$2.29-', '$5.30-'). Pipeline marks all financial words INVALID on refund receipts. No SUBTOTAL/GRAND_TOTAL labels found.
action: recognize RETURN receipts and skip financial validation or handle negative totals

root_cause: Duplicate TAX: Costco prints tax 3x (receipt body + 'A 9.5% Tax 1.90' + 'TOTAL TAX 1.90'). All three labeled TAX. No GRAND_TOTAL label at eval time so no equation fires, but per-word INVALID from structured fast path.
action: deduplicate Costco tax breakdown labels; only label primary TAX line

equation_failures: GRAND_TOTAL (6212.00) != SUBTOTAL (189.81) + TAX (0.00) = 189.81. Difference: 6022.19 | SUBTOTAL (63.27) != sum(LINE_TOTAL) (0.00) - DISCOUNT (0.00) = 0.00. Difference: 63.27
root_cause: OCR junk: '** TOTAL 6212' → GRAND_TOTAL=6212 (should be member ref or OCR error for $62.12). Duplicate SUBTOTAL: 63.27 labeled 3x (receipt + EFT/Debit + AMOUNT). LINE_TOTAL on wrong word.
action: filter unreasonable GRAND_TOTAL values; deduplicate payment-section labels

root_cause: OCR junk: '* TOTAL 4192' → SUBTOTAL=4192 (Costco ref number, not dollar amount). Actual subtotal $41.99 not labeled.
action: filter unreasonable SUBTOTAL values; Costco '* TOTAL NNNN' is member ref not amount

root_cause: Costco double-column OCR: 'SUBTOTAL 21 21.88' → two words, SUBTOTAL labeled on both '21' (=21.00) and '21.88'. Same for GRAND_TOTAL. Duplicates from reading both columns.
action: deduplicate Costco double-column reads; pick the complete decimal value

equation_failures: GRAND_TOTAL (320.00) != SUBTOTAL (36.29) + TAX (0.00) = 36.29. Difference: 283.71 | SUBTOTAL (36.29) != sum(LINE_TOTAL) (78.98) - DISCOUNT (0.00) = 78.98. Difference: -42.69
root_cause: OCR junk: GRAND_TOTAL=320.00 is actually TAX '$3,20' with comma parsed as 320. Duplicate LINE_TOTALs from 'TOTAL $39.49' and 'DB AMT $39.49'. Actual total is $39.49.
action: filter unreasonable GRAND_TOTAL; don't label payment-section duplicates as LINE_TOTAL

root_cause: Duplicate GRAND_TOTAL: 'Total $14.53' and 'DEBIT CARD SALE $14.53' both labeled GRAND_TOTAL. No SUBTOTAL/TAX labels at eval time.
action: don't label payment-section amounts as GRAND_TOTAL

equation_failures: GRAND_TOTAL (13.86) != SUBTOTAL (11.75) + TAX (0.85) = 12.60. Difference: 1.26 | SUBTOTAL (11.75) != sum(LINE_TOTAL) (25.61) - DISCOUNT (0.00) = 25.61. Difference: -13.86
root_cause: Duplicate GRAND_TOTAL: '$12.60' (Total) and '$13.86' (DEBIT CARD SALE) both labeled. LINE_TOTAL labels on wrong words ($12.60=Total, $1.26=Tip, $0.00=modifiers). Real line totals are item prices ($7.20, $1.55, $3.00).
action: don't label payment total or tip as GRAND_TOTAL/LINE_TOTAL; fix item price labeling

root_cause: Missing labels: only entertainment tax $0.44 labeled as TAX. SUBTOTAL ($8.00), sales tax ($0.76), and GRAND_TOTAL ($9.20) all unlabeled at eval time. Per-word INVALID on isolated TAX.
action: label all financial fields; entertainment tax format '*(5%) Entertainment' not recognized
